sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 61:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 61:1
items.html: The expansion of the Nekudot of SAG into the inner MA and BON of AK, where they connected with the bottom Hey. This is the fundamental action for all the innovations that took place in the world of Nekudim. (Inner Light, Item 5)
